visual_analysis.description: A transparent plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located at the back right.
A green soda can located in front of the clear water bottle.
A black soda can located to the left of the green soda can.
A white soda can with purple text, located on the far left.
The wooden surface on which all the objects are placed.

action_plan.explanation: The green soda can is directly in front of the clear water bottle and must be moved to allow access for grasping.
The clear water bottle is now accessible after removing the occluding green soda can.
